Plus konklusion-historik siger T10.4 ON CONFLICT er "DEFER", men V6 gjorde det obligatorisk. Codex V1-fund-tabel siger stadig "DEFER → G-nummer".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | **ACCEPT.** Tekstrettelser: 9→10 på `client_field_definitions`; opdatér V1-fund-tabel (linje 68) og Konklusion-historik (linje 1335) til at reflektere V6's ACCEPT.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | T10.4 + linje 68 + linje 1335 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1825:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1373:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3852:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11128:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:331:| 4   | KRITISK-FABRIKATION | T10.16                                          | Plan refererer `FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS`-allowlist i scripts/fitness.mjs, men den findes IKKE. Master-plan §3 punkt 19 specificerer fitness-checken men den er ikke implementeret. T9-migration-kommentar (`20260518000004_t9_client_node_placements.sql:5`) er forhåndsdokumentation, ikke nuværende fitness-check.                                    | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Omformulér T10.16: i stedet for "fjern client_id fra allowlist", verificér at FK-coverage-checken er implementeret; hvis ikke, ingen fitness-script-ændring nødvendig for FK. **Plus** tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (fund #5). G-nummer-kandidat for "FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19". |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1826:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1374:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3857:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11133:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:396:| T1-drop af D5's public-schema                                                                          | `supabase/migrations/20260514120000_t1_drop_public.sql:32-92`                                                  | Dropper `public.clients`, `public.client_field_definitions`, `public.client_upsert`, `public.client_field_definition_upsert`, `public.clients_validate_fields`, `public.audit_filter_values`, `public.is_admin()`, `public.stork_audit()` etc. INGEN post-T1 migration genskaber clients.                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1827:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1375:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3909:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11186:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:833:   579	- **Hvad:** Genskab D5's clients-special-case-mønster: walker `clients.fields` jsonb og hashes hver key der har `pii_level='direct'` i `client_field_definitions`. **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** ingen `is_active = true`-filter på direct-PII keys — ellers ville deaktivering af et felt skabe datalæk for værdier i eksisterende fields jsonb. Validation-trigger T10.6 behandler stadig inactive som ukendt-key (LENIENT warning), men audit-hashing rammer alle direct-PII definitioner. Resten af T1-logikken bevares uændret.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1828:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1376:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3985:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11264:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1791:  1522	  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`                                      | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1829:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1377:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3986:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11265:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1792:  1523	  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1830:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1378:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:3996:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11275:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:1843:  1574	| `t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`   | LENIENT-default WARN; strict-mode raise                                                                               | grøn             |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1832:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1380:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4009:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11289:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-13.md:2004:  1735	- T10.16 omformuleret: `FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS` findes ikke i nuværende fitness-script (master-plan §3.19 ikke implementeret); plan tilføjer i stedet `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (Code-validering #4 + #5). G-nummer for FK-coverage-check.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1856:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1404:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4316:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11943:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`                                      | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1857:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1405:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4317:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11944:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1858:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1406:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4325:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:11966:    "core_identity.clients_validate_fields", // V8 (Codex runde 7) — T10.6 trigger-funktion; filtrerer på aktive felt-definitioner som lifecycle-signal
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1859:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1407:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4332:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:12069:| 1   | KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL | T10.4    | `clients.logo_filename` klassificeret som `pii_level='none'` → brugerleveret filnavn lander i klartekst i audit_log. Inkonsistent med `clients.name='direct'` (forsigtigheds-pattern). Filnavne kan realistisk indeholde klient-/personidentifikatorer. | **ACCEPT + proaktiv udvidelse.** `logo_filename` → `pii_level='direct'`. **Plus:** `logo_bytes` → `'direct'` (binær billed-data kan vise stifter/medarbejdere — samme forsigtigheds-pattern). `logo_content_type` forbliver `'none'` (kun MIME-type). T10.15's logo-test udvides med audit-hash-assertion. | T10.4 + T10.15 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1860:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1408:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4334:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:12078:| 2   | G-NUMMER-KANDIDAT | T10.16 / Oprydnings-strategi | T10.16 nævner FK-coverage som G-nummer-kandidat, men oprydnings-strategi siger "Ingen G-numre forventet". Inkonsistent.                                                                                                                   | **ACCEPT.** **G058** registreret i `docs/teknisk/teknisk-gaeld.md` (FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19). Oprydnings-strategi opdateret til at angive G057 + G058 som del af trin 10.            |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1861:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1409:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4339:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:12105:**T9-public-wrapper-bug (Code-observation):** Codex' fund afslører at T9's 7 public-wrappers (`org_node_upsert`, `org_node_deactivate`, `team_close`, `employee_place`, `employee_remove_from_node`, `client_node_place`, `client_node_close`) alle mangler `t9_write_authorized`-session-var. Trin 10's scope er kun de to client-RPC'er; de øvrige 5 er T9-arbejde der skal adresseres som G-nummer/separat pakke (T9 ville fungere i tests fordi `_apply_*`-handlers er SECURITY DEFINER og kan kaldes direkte, men authenticated-bruger via wrapper-vej er broken).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1862:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1410:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4340:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:12117:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.6                  | `clients_validate_fields()` trigger-funktion har `cfd.is_active = true` filter. Rammer fitness-check `legacy-is-active-readers` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:830-892`). T10.16 allowlister kun `client_field_definitions_list`.                                                                    | Codex runde 7     | **ACCEPT.** Udvid T10.16 med `core_identity.clients_validate_fields`. Forretningsmæssigt korrekt at filtrere på aktive felt-definitioner i validate-trigger (LENIENT: ukendte/inaktive keys → warning) — det er ikke R7d-pattern (employees-dual-column), bare lifecycle-signal. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1863:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1411:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4353:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:12143:| 4   | LAV      | T10.4 + Konklusion | "alle 9 kolonner" + "(9 kolonner)" på `client_field_definitions` — SQL har 10 rækker (id, key, display_name, field_type, required, pii_level, display_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at). Plus konklusion-historik siger T10.4 ON CONFLICT er "DEFER", men V6 gjorde det obligatorisk. Codex V1-fund-tabel siger stadig "DEFER → G-nummer".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | **ACCEPT.** Tekstrettelser: 9→10 på `client_field_definitions`; opdatér V1-fund-tabel (linje 68) og Konklusion-historik (linje 1335) til at reflektere V6's ACCEPT.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | T10.4 + linje 68 + linje 1335 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1864:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1412:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4356:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:12158:| 2   | KRITISK             | T10.4                                           | INSERT i `core_compliance.data_field_definitions` mangler `ON CONFLICT do nothing`. `core_compliance.data_field_definitions` er på `BOOTSTRAP_CONFIG_TABLES` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:162-172`); `migration-on-conflict-discipline` (`:675-737`) håndhæver det. V5's DEFER til G-nummer var forkert — fitness brækker.                                    | Mathias-terminal | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `on conflict (table_schema, table_name, column_name) do nothing`. Fjern G-nummer-kandidat-tekst fra Optimerings-hypoteser (det er ikke en optimering, det er krav).                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1865:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1413:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:4358:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:12160:| 4   | KRITISK-FABRIKATION | T10.16                                          | Plan refererer `FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS`-allowlist i scripts/fitness.mjs, men den findes IKKE. Master-plan §3 punkt 19 specificerer fitness-checken men den er ikke implementeret. T9-migration-kommentar (`20260518000004_t9_client_node_placements.sql:5`) er forhåndsdokumentation, ikke nuværende fitness-check.                                    | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Omformulér T10.16: i stedet for "fjern client_id fra allowlist", verificér at FK-coverage-checken er implementeret; hvis ikke, ingen fitness-script-ændring nødvendig for FK. **Plus** tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (fund #5). G-nummer-kandidat for "FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19". |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1909:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1457:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:5223:| 1   | KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL | T10.4    | `clients.logo_filename` klassificeret som `pii_level='none'` → brugerleveret filnavn lander i klartekst i audit_log. Inkonsistent med `clients.name='direct'` (forsigtigheds-pattern). Filnavne kan realistisk indeholde klient-/personidentifikatorer. | **ACCEPT + proaktiv udvidelse.** `logo_filename` → `pii_level='direct'`. **Plus:** `logo_bytes` → `'direct'` (binær billed-data kan vise stifter/medarbejdere — samme forsigtigheds-pattern). `logo_content_type` forbliver `'none'` (kun MIME-type). T10.15's logo-test udvides med audit-hash-assertion. | T10.4 + T10.15 |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1911:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1459:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:5277:/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"### T10\\.15|t10_client_active_check|T1: opret aktiv|T2:|T3 \\(apply|T4a|T6 \\(V10|T7 \\(V10|T8 \\(V10\" docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md" in /home/mathias/stork-2.0
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1912:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1460:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:5284:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:1913:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1461:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:5286:1709:- T10.15 smoke-test T4a tilføjet: `client_node_close` med non-existent client_id → P0002.

T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Rammer fitness-check `legacy-is-active-readers` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:830-892`). T10.16 allowlister kun `client_field_definitions_list`.                                                                    | Codex runde 7     | **ACCEPT.** Udvid T10.16 med `core_identity.clients_validate_fields`. docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2011:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1559:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:8581:docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:71:**T9-public-wrapper-bug (Code-observation):** Codex' fund afslører at T9's 7 public-wrappers (`org_node_upsert`, `org_node_deactivate`, `team_close`, `employee_place`, `employee_remove_from_node`, `client_node_place`, `client_node_close`) alle mangler `t9_write_authorized`-session-var. Trin 10's scope er kun de to client-RPC'er; de øvrige 5 er T9-arbejde der skal adresseres som G-nummer/separat pakke (T9 ville fungere i tests fordi `_apply_*`-handlers er SECURITY DEFINER og kan kaldes direkte, men authenticated-bruger via wrapper-vej er broken).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2012:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1560:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:8583:docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:126:| 4   | KRITISK-FABRIKATION | T10.16                                          | Plan refererer `FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS`-allowlist i scripts/fitness.mjs, men den findes IKKE. Master-plan §3 punkt 19 specificerer fitness-checken men den er ikke implementeret. T9-migration-kommentar (`20260518000004_t9_client_node_placements.sql:5`) er forhåndsdokumentation, ikke nuværende fitness-check.                                    | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Omformulér T10.16: i stedet for "fjern client_id fra allowlist", verificér at FK-coverage-checken er implementeret; hvis ikke, ingen fitness-script-ændring nødvendig for FK. **Plus** tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (fund #5). G-nummer-kandidat for "FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19". |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2013:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1561:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:8623:docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:1543:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup) | **V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12):** efter `begin;` skal testen sætte `stork.t9_write_authorized='true'` og UPDATE `core_identity.undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place','client_close')` for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2014:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:1562:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:8633:docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:1709:- T10.15 smoke-test T4a tilføjet: `client_node_close` med non-existent client_id → P0002.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2051:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-1.md:2101:**G-numre rejst:** G057 (T9 forretnings-invariants uden superadmin-bypass), G058 (FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2052:docs/coor nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie Mathias #1): opret pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → approve+apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success (bypass på aktiv-check, ikke på eksistens-check). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped (`client_node_placements` på TX_WRAP_REQUIRED). |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2053:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10292:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-8.md:2127:  2. **R7d-allowlist (KRÆVET):** Tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`). RPC'en bruger `where p_include_inactive or is_active = true` for at filtrere aktive felt-definitioner. `client_field_definitions` har KUN is_active (ingen status-kolonne) — matcher allowliste-kommentaren: "T9-tabellerne har is_active som lifecycle-signal alene; ingen status-kolonne. Disse er allowlist'et nedenfor."

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2067:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10306:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:261:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.6                  | `clients_validate_fields()` trigger-funktion har `cfd.is_active = true` filter. T10.16 allowlister kun `client_field_definitions_list`.                                                                    | Codex runde 7     | **ACCEPT.** Udvid T10.16 med `core_identity.clients_validate_fields`. Forretningsmæssigt korrekt at filtrere på aktive felt-definitioner i validate-trigger (LENIENT: ukendte/inaktive keys → warning) — det er ikke R7d-pattern (employees-dual-column), bare lifecycle-signal. |

Matcher `client_set_active`-mønstret + krav-dok §3.2.                                                                                                           |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2070:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10309:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:286:| 3   | MELLEM   | T10.15             | Smoke-test dækker FK-eksistens + ON DELETE RESTRICT, men ikke det vigtigste forretningskrav (krav-dok §2.5.2: inaktiv klient kan ikke vælges).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | **ACCEPT.** Ny separat smoke-test `t10_client_active_check.sql` med 4 scenarier: aktiv place success, inaktiv place rejection (22023), pending-mens-aktiv + deaktiver + apply rejection (P0001), close virker på inaktiv klient.                                                                                                                                                                                   | T10.15 + ny test-fil          |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2071:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10310:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:287:| 4   | LAV      | T10.4 + Konklusion | "alle 9 kolonner" + "(9 kolonner)" på `client_field_definitions` — SQL har 10 rækker (id, key, display_name, field_type, required, pii_level, display_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at). Plus konklusion-historik siger T10.4 ON CONFLICT er "DEFER", men V6 gjorde det obligatorisk. Codex V1-fund-tabel siger stadig "DEFER → G-nummer".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | **ACCEPT.** Tekstrettelser: 9→10 på `client_field_definitions`; opdatér V1-fund-tabel (linje 68) og Konklusion-historik (linje 1335) til at reflektere V6's ACCEPT.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | T10.4 + linje 68 + linje 1335 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2072:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10311:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:303:| 3   | KRITISK/FUNKTIONELT | T10.1 + T10.2 + T10.8 + T10.9 + T10.11 + T10.12 | `has_permission(p_page, NULL, false)` med `p_tab_key=NULL` springer tab-resolver over (`20260518000010_t9_seed_owners.sql:35`) og prøver kun page/area-grants. T10.13 seeder kun TAB-grants → read-paths matcher INGEN grant og returnerer false → SELECT-policy + read-RPC'er tilbageholder data for legitime brugere med kun `clients/manage`-grant. | Mathias-terminal | **ACCEPT.** Skift alle read-paths til tab-aware: `has_permission('clients', 'manage', false)` og `has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', false)`. Berører SELECT-policies (T10.1 + T10.2), client_get/client_list/client_field_definitions_list (T10.12), client_logo_get (T10.11). Write-paths bruger allerede 'manage' tab — konsistent.                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2073:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10312:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:304:| 4   | KRITISK-FABRIKATION | T10.16                                          | Plan refererer `FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS`-allowlist i scripts/fitness.mjs, men den findes IKKE. Master-plan §3 punkt 19 specificerer fitness-checken men den er ikke implementeret. T9-migration-kommentar (`20260518000004_t9_client_node_placements.sql:5`) er forhåndsdokumentation, ikke nuværende fitness-check.                                    | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Omformulér T10.16: i stedet for "fjern client_id fra allowlist", verificér at FK-coverage-checken er implementeret; hvis ikke, ingen fitness-script-ændring nødvendig for FK. **Plus** tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (fund #5). G-nummer-kandidat for "FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19". |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2074:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10313:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:305:| 5   | KRITISK             | T10.12 client_field_definitions_list            | RPC bruger `where p_include_inactive or is_active = true` — matcher fitness-check `legacy-is-active-readers` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:830-892`) regex. client_field_definitions har KUN is_active (ingen status-kolonne), så funktionen skal allowlist'es i `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS`.                                                          | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til allowlisten via T10.16's fitness-script-ændring.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2075:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10314:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:306:| 6   | KRITISK             | T10.15 `t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`      | Smoke-test INSERT'er i `core_identity.client_node_placements` som er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` (`:901-924`) kræver `begin;` + `rollback;` på linje-niveau.                                                                                                | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Eksplicit `begin;` + `rollback;` wrap-pattern i T10.15's FK-test specifikation. T10.7a's fixture-INSERT i T9-tests sker indenfor eksisterende BEGIN/ROLLBACK (verificeret: `t9_placements.sql:9` + `:213`, `t9_backdated_historical_traversal.sql:9` + `:311`).                                                                                                                            |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2076:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10315:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:318:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.1 + T10.2 | Tabellerne har kun `GRANT SELECT to authenticated`. Mangler `GRANT INSERT, UPDATE` der er nødvendigt før RLS-policy/session-var-vejen kan virke for write-RPC'erne (T10.8-T10.11). Bryder niveau 1-prefixens GRANT + policy + session-var-tre-pak. | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `grant insert, update on table core_identity.clients to authenticated` i T10.1 og tilsvarende for `client_field_definitions` i T10.2. Ingen DELETE-grant (inaktivering via is_active, ikke DELETE). Matcher T1's mønster for `core_compliance.data_field_definitions`. | T10.1 + T10.2 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2077:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10316:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:338:| 1   | KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL | T10.10 / T10.5 | Audit-hashing afhænger af mutable `client_field_definitions.key`/`pii_level`. Hvis felt-definitionen senere får ny `key` eller `pii_level='none'`, vil eksisterende `clients.fields`-værdier skrives i klartekst i audit. V2-fixet for `is_active=false` dækker ikke key-rename eller pii-downgrade. | **ACCEPT.** Gør `key` og `pii_level` effektivt immutable for eksisterende definitions via T10.10's RPC: blokér UPDATE af `key`; blokér `pii_level` direct → non-direct. Tilføj smoke-test der verificerer begge invariants. | T10.10 + T10.15                    |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2078:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10317:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:369:| T1-drop af D5's public-schema                                                                          | `supabase/migrations/20260514120000_t1_drop_public.sql:32-92`                                                  | Dropper `public.clients`, `public.client_field_definitions`, `public.client_upsert`, `public.client_field_definition_upsert`, `public.clients_validate_fields`, `public.audit_filter_values`, `public.is_admin()`, `public.stork_audit()` etc. INGEN post-T1 migration genskaber clients.                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2079:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10318:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:397:| `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` i fitness-script                                                   | `scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`                                                                                  | Allowlist for funktioner der bruger `is_active = true` filter uden tilsvarende `status = 'active'`-check. docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2084:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10323:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:455:### `clients` + `client_field_definitions` får retention_type='permanent' (kræver allowlist-udvidelse)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2085:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10324:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:457:**Begrundelse:** Krav-dok §2.5.1 + §2.5.2 siger klient-rækken bevares evigt; client_field_definitions er konfig-tabel der også bevares evigt. `permanent` matcher denne semantik bedst. D1b-allowlist skal udvides for at retention-validate-trigger ikke blokerer.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2140:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10379:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:878:86:| 3   | KRITISK/FUNKTIONELT | T10.1 + T10.2 + T10.8 + T10.9 + T10.11 + T10.12 | `has_permission(p_page, NULL, false)` med `p_tab_key=NULL` springer tab-resolver over (`20260518000010_t9_seed_owners.sql:35`) og prøver kun page/area-grants. T10.13 seeder kun TAB-grants → read-paths matcher INGEN grant og returnerer false → SELECT-policy + read-RPC'er tilbageholder data for legitime brugere med kun `clients/manage`-grant. | Mathias-terminal | **ACCEPT.** Skift alle read-paths til tab-aware: `has_permission('clients', 'manage', false)` og `has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', false)`. Berører SELECT-policies (T10.1 + T10.2), client_get/client_list/client_field_definitions_list (T10.12), client_logo_get (T10.11). Write-paths bruger allerede 'manage' tab — konsistent.                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2141:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10380:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:879:87:| 4   | KRITISK-FABRIKATION | T10.16                                          | Plan refererer `FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS`-allowlist i scripts/fitness.mjs, men den findes IKKE. T9-migration-kommentar (`20260518000004_t9_client_node_placements.sql:5`) er forhåndsdokumentation, ikke nuværende fitness-check.                                    | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Omformulér T10.16: i stedet for "fjern client_id fra allowlist", verificér at FK-coverage-checken er implementeret; hvis ikke, ingen fitness-script-ændring nødvendig for FK. **Plus** tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (fund #5). G-nummer-kandidat for "FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19". |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2143:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10382:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:881:89:| 6   | KRITISK             | T10.15 `t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`      | Smoke-test INSERT'er i `core_identity.client_node_placements` som er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` (`:901-924`) kræver `begin;` + `rollback;` på linje-niveau.                                                                                                | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Eksplicit `begin;` + `rollback;` wrap-pattern i T10.15's FK-test specifikation. T10.7a's fixture-INSERT i T9-tests sker indenfor eksisterende BEGIN/ROLLBACK (verificeret: `t9_placements.sql:9` + `:213`, `t9_backdated_historical_traversal.sql:9` + `:311`).                                                                                                                            |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2144:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10383:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:884:101:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.1 + T10.2 | Tabellerne har kun `GRANT SELECT to authenticated`. Mangler `GRANT INSERT, UPDATE` der er nødvendigt før RLS-policy/session-var-vejen kan virke for write-RPC'erne (T10.8-T10.11). Bryder niveau 1-prefixens GRANT + policy + session-var-tre-pak. | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `grant insert, update on table core_identity.clients to authenticated` i T10.1 og tilsvarende for `client_field_definitions` i T10.2. Ingen DELETE-grant (inaktivering via is_active, ikke DELETE). Matcher T1's mønster for `core_compliance.data_field_definitions`. | T10.1 + T10.2 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2145:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10384:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:888:121:| 1   | KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL | T10.10 / T10.5 | Audit-hashing afhænger af mutable `client_field_definitions.key`/`pii_level`. Hvis felt-definitionen senere får ny `key` eller `pii_level='none'`, vil eksisterende `clients.fields`-værdier skrives i klartekst i audit. V2-fixet for `is_active=false` dækker ikke key-rename eller pii-downgrade. | **ACCEPT.** Gør `key` og `pii_level` effektivt immutable for eksisterende definitions via T10.10's RPC: blokér UPDATE af `key`; blokér `pii_level` direct → non-direct. Tilføj smoke-test der verificerer begge invariants. | T10.10 + T10.15                    |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2146:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10385:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:895:152:| T1-drop af D5's public-schema                                                                          | `supabase/migrations/20260514120000_t1_drop_public.sql:32-92`                                                  | Dropper `public.clients`, `public.client_field_definitions`, `public.client_upsert`, `public.client_field_definition_upsert`, `public.clients_validate_fields`, `public.audit_filter_values`, `public.is_admin()`, `public.stork_audit()` etc. INGEN post-T1 migration genskaber clients.                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2147:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10386:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:915:180:| `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` i fitness-script                                                   | `scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`                                                                                  | Allowlist for funktioner der bruger `is_active = true` filter uden tilsvarende `status = 'active'`-check. docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2150:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10389:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:925:209:- Fitness-script-opdatering (tilføj `client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS`)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2151:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10390:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:932:236:**Begrundelse:** Default-null på logo-parametre i client_upsert ville utilsigtet slette logo ved almindelig UPDATE (datatab). Dedikeret `client_logo_set` + `client_logo_clear` + `client_logo_get` adskiller logo-håndtering eksplicit.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2152:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10391:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:933:238:### `clients` + `client_field_definitions` får retention_type='permanent' (kræver allowlist-udvidelse)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2153:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10392:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:934:240:**Begrundelse:** Krav-dok §2.5.1 + §2.5.2 siger klient-rækken bevares evigt; client_field_definitions er konfig-tabel der også bevares evigt. `permanent` matcher denne semantik bedst. D1b-allowlist skal udvides for at retention-validate-trigger ikke blokerer.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2154:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10393:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:936:246:### `client_field_definitions` er global (ikke pr-klient)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2155:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10394:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:940:260:  - **Plan-konsekvens:** Global `client_field_definitions` valgt frem for pr-klient (enklere; forretningsgang opfyldes via fields jsonb pr. klient).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2156:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10395:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:948:318:    'Trin 10: klient-master. name er identifikator; fields jsonb indeholder pr-klient værdier per client_field_definitions. is_active toggle erstatter DELETE (krav-dok §2.5.2). Logo som bytea (krav-dok §2.4). Klient anonymiseres ikke (krav-dok §2.5.1) — derfor ingen anonymized_at-kolonne.';

For at ændre `key`: marker den gamle definition `is_active=false` og INSERT en ny. For at sænke pii-niveau: behandl som ny definition.

V7 tilføjer `t10_client_active_check.sql` for T10.7b-leverancen.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2269:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10508:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1208:1489:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_lifecycle.sql`                            | client_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), client_set_active toggle, client_get returnerer korrekt is_active. has_permission-spærring uden permission-row. is_active toggle bevarer øvrige felter. **V8 (Code walk-through #2):** assert client_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active (set inaktiv → upsert med ny name → read is_active stadig false).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2270:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10509:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1209:1490:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_field_definitions.sql`                    | client_field_definition_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), is_active toggle, client_field_definitions_list respekterer p_include_inactive. **Audit-PII-hashing:** insert med pii_level='direct' key i fields → audit_log har sha256-hash. **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE af `key` afvises (errcode 22023). UPDATE af pii_level direct → none afvises (errcode 22023). pii_level none → indirect → direct accepteres. **V8 (Code walk-through #3+#4):** assert client_field_definition_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. client_field_definition_set_active toggles is_active uafhængigt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2271:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10510:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1210:1491:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_logo.sql`                                 | client_logo_set + client_logo_get + client_logo_clear. **Assert client_upsert UPDATE af name/fields bevarer logo_bytes uændret** (read før+efter; sammenlign). consistency-CHECK blokerer partiel logo. client_logo_set fejler hvis ét felt er NULL.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2272:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10511:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1211:1492:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`                   | FK virker: INSERT med ikke-eksisterende client_id fejler. DELETE af klient med åbne placements fejler RESTRICT. **V6 (Code-validering fund #6):** Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped (linje-niveau) — `core_identity.client_node_placements` er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` blokerer ellers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2273:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10512:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1212:1493:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`                     | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2274:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10513:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1213:1494:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context) | T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2275:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10514:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1217:1505:  2. **R7d-allowlist (KRÆVET):** Tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`). RPC'en bruger `where p_include_inactive or is_active = true` for at filtrere aktive felt-definitioner. `client_field_definitions` har KUN is_active (ingen status-kolonne) — matcher allowliste-kommentaren: "T9-tabellerne har is_active som lifecycle-signal alene; ingen status-kolonne. Disse er allowlist'et nedenfor."
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2276:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10515:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1221:1515:    "core_identity.client_field_definitions_list", // V6 — T10.12 RPC; client_field_definitions har kun is_active, ingen status

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2279:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10518:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1227:1531:| Hver SELECT-policy bred nok til legitime læsere                | ja     | T10.1, T10.2 — has_permission('clients'/'client_field_definitions', 'manage', false) **tab-aware (V6-fix)**. docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2299:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10538:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1362:- **Hvad:** SECURITY DEFINER write-RPC for client_field_definitions. has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true). **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE forbyder ændring af `key` (audit-PII-hash i clients.fields ville miste reference); UPDATE forbyder pii_level direct → non-direct (eksisterende værdier ville pludselig skrives i klartekst i audit). For at ændre `key`: marker den gamle definition `is_active=false` og INSERT en ny. For at sænke pii-niveau: behandl som ny definition.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2360:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10599:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1736:- **Hvad:** Seks smoke-tests dækker centrale flows. V7 tilføjer `t10_client_active_check.sql` for T10.7b-leverancen.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2361:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10600:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1741:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_lifecycle.sql`                            | client_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), client_set_active toggle, client_get returnerer korrekt is_active. has_permission-spærring uden permission-row. is_active toggle bevarer øvrige felter. **V8 (Code walk-through #2):** assert client_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active (set inaktiv → upsert med ny name → read is_active stadig false).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2362:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10601:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1742:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_field_definitions.sql`                    | client_field_definition_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), is_active toggle, client_field_definitions_list respekterer p_include_inactive. **Audit-PII-hashing:** insert med pii_level='direct' key i fields → audit_log har sha256-hash. **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE af `key` afvises (errcode 22023). UPDATE af pii_level direct → none afvises (errcode 22023). pii_level none → indirect → direct accepteres. **V8 (Code walk-through #3+#4):** assert client_field_definition_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. client_field_definition_set_active toggles is_active uafhængigt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2363:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10602:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1743:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_logo.sql`                                 | client_logo_set + client_logo_get + client_logo_clear. **Assert client_upsert UPDATE af name/fields bevarer logo_bytes uændret** (read før+efter; sammenlign). consistency-CHECK blokerer partiel logo. client_logo_set fejler hvis ét felt er NULL.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2364:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10603:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1744:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`                   | FK virker: INSERT med ikke-eksisterende client_id fejler. DELETE af klient med åbne placements fejler RESTRICT. **V6 (Code-validering fund #6):** Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped (linje-niveau) — `core_identity.client_node_placements` er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` blokerer ellers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2365:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10604:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1745:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_clients_validate_fields.sql`                     | LENIENT-default: unknown key i fields → warning, INSERT accepteret. Strict-mode (`stork.clients_fields_strict='true'`): unknown key → exception. **V2 (Codex V1 MELLEM):** assert at non-object fields (`'"scalar"'::jsonb`, `'[1,2]'::jsonb`) afvises af `clients_fields_is_object`-CHECK (errcode 23514). **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** assert audit-PII-hashing rammer direct-PII keys i fields selv efter felt-definitionen er sat is_active=false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2366:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10605:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1746:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7 + V10 cron-context) | T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2367:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10606:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:1757:  2. **R7d-allowlist (KRÆVET):** Tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`). RPC'en bruger `where p_include_inactive or is_active = true` for at filtrere aktive felt-definitioner. `client_field_definitions` har KUN is_active (ingen status-kolonne) — matcher allowliste-kommentaren: "T9-tabellerne har is_active som lifecycle-signal alene; ingen status-kolonne. Disse er allowlist'et nedenfor."

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2396:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10635:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:4096:  "public.client_field_definitions",
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2397:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10636:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:5253:Body: Niveau 1 kræver end-to-end-tjek per write-vej. V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje for `client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place` og `client_field_definition_set_active`, men fundament-tabellen nævner kun T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.11 + T10.13. Selve steps har meget af materialet, men krydstjekket er ufuldstændigt. Manglende tjek på write-vej = KRITISK efter prefix.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2398:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10637:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-10.md:5262:Body: Niveau 1 kræver end-to-end-tjek per write-vej. V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje for `client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place` og `client_field_definition_set_active`, men fundament-tabellen nævner kun T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.11 + T10.13. Selve steps har meget af materialet, men krydstjekket er ufuldstændigt. Manglende tjek på write-vej = KRITISK efter prefix.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2399:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10638:docs/coordination/aktiv-plan.md:11:- **Trin 10** (Klient-skabelon: core_identity.clients + client_field_definitions + logo + is_active + FK fra T9 + aktiv-check med superadmin-bypass + employee-id-baseret apply-bypass for cron-context + PII-hashing for logo) afsluttet 2026-05-21. Plan V14 efter 14 Codex-runder + 13+ Code walk-through-passes. 12 migrations + 6 smoke-tests + fitness-script-allowlist + master-plan §1.8 + §4 trin 10 rettelser. G057 + G058 registreret som teknisk gæld. Plan + krav-dok + approval-fil arkiveret i `docs/coordination/arkiv/`. Slut-rapport: TBD.

V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje i T10.7b (`client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place`) + T10.10a (`client_field_definition_set_active`) — manglende krydstjek. | **ACCEPT.** Fundament-tjek-tabel udvidet med T10.7b (GRANT/policy/session-var + apply-dispatch + jsonb payload producer/consumer) og T10.10a. Eksempel-row-tjek udvidet med immutable-key + pii-downgrade-block + active-check. |

Hvis nogen senere tilføjer page med samme navn i andet area (usandsynligt, men ikke robust).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | **ADOPT.** Trivielt fix: scope queries til `org_structure`-area via JOIN på area_id.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | T10.13         |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2402:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10641:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:280:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.6                  | `clients_validate_fields()` trigger-funktion har `cfd.is_active = true` filter. T10.16 allowlister kun `client_field_definitions_list`.                                                                    | Codex runde 7     | **ACCEPT.** Udvid T10.16 med `core_identity.clients_validate_fields`. Forretningsmæssigt korrekt at filtrere på aktive felt-definitioner i validate-trigger (LENIENT: ukendte/inaktive keys → warning) — det er ikke R7d-pattern (employees-dual-column), bare lifecycle-signal. |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2419:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10658:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:474:### `clients` + `client_field_definitions` får retention_type='permanent' (kræver allowlist-udvidelse)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-slut-rapport-runde-2.md:2420:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-1.md:10659:docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-12.md:476:**Begrundelse:** Krav-dok §2.5.1 + §2.5.2 siger klient-rækken bevares evigt; client_field_definitions er konfig-tabel der også bevares evigt. `permanent` matcher denne semantik bedst. D1b-allowlist skal udvides for at retention-validate-trigger ikke blokerer.
